fields.label: Turn
fields.description: The settled turn this effect belongs to (D2 §1a).

fields.label: Effect Name
fields.description: One of auto_title/rich_outputs/macro_advance/telemetry_flush/terminal_publish/usage; part of the UNIQUE (turn, effect_name) enforced via the composite doc name (D2 §1a).

fields.label: Status
fields.description: pending -> running (exclusively claimed for one finalize attempt) -> done. A failed attempt returns running -> pending; a stale running claim (claimed_at past the bound) is reclaimable; FORCE-DONE after FINALIZE_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3 (OAR-9 / CDX-4).

fields.label: Attempts
fields.description: Incremented atomically on every EXCLUSIVE claim (pending/stale-running -> running) for this effect; the force-done budget (FINALIZE_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3) reads it (D2 §1a / CDX-4).

fields.label: Claim Token
fields.description: The current exclusive-claim token (CDX-4): stamped when a finalize attempt claims the effect (pending/stale-running -> running); complete_effect / release_effect fence on it so a stale finalizer cannot complete or release an effect another finalizer re-claimed.

fields.label: Claimed At
fields.description: When the current running claim was taken (CDX-4). A running effect whose claimed_at is older than EFFECT_CLAIM_STALE_S is reclaimable by a fresh claim (the prior finalizer crashed).
